summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly not a dedupe cluster. Open security-sensitive #89041 is routed to central security handling. Closed candidates #47706 and #47754 are kept closed. The remaining open PRs are kept related or independent for maintainer/product review rather than closure, merge, or fix work because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and several candidates still have proof, draft, review, or technical-correctness gates.

actions.reason: Useful focused candidate for a linked open issue family; keep for maintainer review rather than close or merge in plan mode.
Security-sensitive item is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup.

needs_human: #82540: maintainer must decide whether non-live gateway regression proof is acceptable for WeChat hot-reload account preservation.
